beefs.title: Western false front architecture
quotes: changed " often used on two-story buildings" to one-story and changed " hiding a gable roof" to flat and true height because one of these buildings defining features is their flat roofs
added flat roof instead of gable, gambrel and arched, because those roof shapes were not typically features of false front buildings. false front buildings are almost always flat.
